name: Requirements-Based Testing
description: Test cases are requirements-based, exercising the software against its requirements (normal and robustness).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-6: test cases and procedures are developed from the high- and low-level requirements; testing is requirements-based.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
